commands.review_summary:
The PR adds a report-only QA Lab scorecard taxonomy fixture, validation parser, coverage-report rendering, and focused tests for mapping existing QA coverage to `taxonomy.yaml`.

PR surface: Source +922, Tests +528, Other +683. Total +2133 across 4 files.

Reproducibility: not applicable. this is a PR adding report-only QA coverage taxonomy behavior rather than a bug report.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] The remaining action is maintainer confirmation of taxonomy ownership and acceptable proof scope, not a narrow automated code repair.

target.title: Add QA scorecard taxonomy validation
target.body:
## Summary

- Rework the QA scorecard fixture as an executable coverage/profile mapping layer over landed `taxonomy.yaml` from #91512, with `taxonomy.yaml` remaining authoritative for maturity surfaces, categories, and levels.
- Derive stable executable category IDs from taxonomy surface/category refs and map existing `qa/scenarios/**` coverage IDs to those categories.
- Keep only `smoke-ci` and `release` as runnable profiles; keep advisory compatibility as report-only metadata with no runnable profile membership.
- Validate missing coverage mappings, scenario/docs/code refs, invalid taxonomy/category/profile refs, release-blocking `release` membership, non-advisory rows without current runnable membership, advisory rows assigned to profiles, retired profile names, and accidental `--runner multipass` usage.
- Render the non-blocking executable mapping and validation warning shape in `openclaw qa coverage`.

## Verification

- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs extensions/qa-lab/src/coverage-report.test.ts`
- `pnpm openclaw qa coverage --output /tmp/openclaw-qa-coverage-scorecard.md`
- `git diff --check`
- `AUTOREVIEW_AUTO_TESTS=0 .agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode local`

## Real behavior proof

Behavior addressed: QA coverage inventory now emits an executable scorecard mapping section layered on `taxonomy.yaml`, with checked-in `smoke-ci`/`release` profile membership and non-blocking validation warnings.
Real environment tested: local OpenClaw source checkout on branch `dallin/coverage-taxonomy-validation` rebased onto current `origin/main`.
Exact steps or command run after this patch: `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs extensions/qa-lab/src/coverage-report.test.ts`; `pnpm openclaw qa coverage --output /tmp/openclaw-qa-coverage-scorecard.md`; `git diff --check`; `AUTOREVIEW_AUTO_TESTS=0 .agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode local`.
Evidence after fix: focused Vitest passed 11 tests; coverage report rendered `Maturity taxonomy: taxonomy.yaml`, `Maturity score snapshot: docs/maturity-scores.yaml`, `Profiles: 2`, `smoke-ci` and `release` profile sections, advisory compatibility as `profiles: none`, and `Validation warnings: 0`; final autoreview reported no accepted/actionable findings.
Observed result after fix: #91500 no longer introduces a competing maturity taxonomy source of truth; `qa/scorecard/stable-lts-taxonomy.json` is an executable QA mapping overlay, current profile terminology is limited to `smoke-ci`/`release`, and `openclaw/multipass` is represented as SDK-backed channel evidence on a host runner rather than `--runner multipass`.
What was not tested: full changed gate, release CI, live provider lanes, and future harness-neutral profile dispatch are not part of this scoped report-only foundation.
target.author: romneyda
